历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 27900 → 28817 → 40917 → 30996 → 36025, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, an abnormal high of 40917 occurred due to adjustments in subject selection requirements, which fell back to 30996 in 2024, and then shifted further back to 36025 in 2025. Over the past two years, the cumulative backward shift is about 5029 places, indicating a trend of moving backward. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 28, 20, 16, 16, and 16 respectively. The 2026 plan is 16, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking 48th on the 2026 Soft Science main list, with a stable ranking between 44 and 53 in recent years. It is a nationally renowned normal university. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is relatively positive, with high popularity for master's degree applications. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 67th (average), with no significant negative public opinion. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of enrollment gaps. It has A+ in Marxist Theory, A+ in Education, A+ in World History, A in Statistics, A- in Ecology, and A- in Biology. Among these, Biology A- is directly related to the Biological Sciences major in the Physics Category, attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science was recommended in 2024, and Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended (76.86), which is related to majors like Computer Science and Data Science in the Physics Category, with high popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in this province is 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, and its enrollment proportion in Guangdong is about 2.5%, making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with no significant regional preference factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend of moving backward, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the intensified competition due to a 3.6% increase in Physics Category examinees in this province, and the pulling effect of high popularity in Computer/Electronic Information majors on applications, based on the 2025 benchmark of 36025, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 36225, with a range of 35725 to 36725.
